title: Micromuseum
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"484d","text":"Micromuseology is the application of miniaturization for the
regulation of miniature artworks diorama exhibition cultural centers.
It was developed through my decades composing collaborative
site-specific micro-operas for the some of the most respected
cultural institutions worldwide and compiles for my fellows of the
Institute for Research and Coordination in Acoustics (IRCAM) Forum
and National Historic and Artistic Heritage Institute (IPHAN) who
joined me in the International Council of Museums (ICOM) Council for
the Defense of Historical, Archaeological, Artistic and Tourist
Heritage Brazil Summit. Its purpose is to set open standards for the
creation of microheritage heritage sites and cultural artifacts
assets safeguard along the Blue Shield International that can serve
as juridical precedent jurisprudence for contemporary art market
regulatory compliance based works valuing, so improving its trust.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
